title: Stasiun Central Hub
description: Located exactly 150 meters from Bandung Central Train Station on Jalan Kebon Kawung, giving your guests instant city connectivity.

title: Tiara Poolside Dining
description: Savor authentic local Sundanese delicacies and international favorites live at our signature Tiara Restaurant space.

title: Colonial Oasis
description: An architectural urban getaway established in 1994, beautifully preserving Bandung's iconic boutique colonial era charm.

title: Grand Convention Halls
description: Equipped with comprehensive meeting spaces, executive boardrooms, and audio-visual setups optimized for high-end corporate events.

title: Family-First Layouts
description: Offering flexible, high-capacity booking options including specialized Superior Quadruple and Executive Family room structures.

title: Crystalline Relaxation
description: Unwind completely with our open-air outdoor swimming pool facility and dedicated safe-depth children's pool zone.
